title: micromeria varia subsp. rupestris
intro: Micromeria varia subsp. rupestris, also known as mountain balm or rock mint, is a subspecies of plant within the Micromeria genus, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeria varia subsp. rupestris include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil for use in herbal remedies, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
